description: Pension and retirement plan content seeds

seeds.text: Retirement pension plans ensure a steady income after you stop working. Choose between immediate annuity and deferred annuity options. Build a retirement corpus through systematic premium payments and receive guaranteed monthly pension for life.

A family pension plan provides a regular income to the surviving family members of a deceased employee or annuitant. It includes types like service pension, family pension, disability pension, and details on eligibility, calculation, and tax treatment of pension income.
